records.question: Which activities involve faculty members whose first name is exactly Daniel?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT activity.actid FROM activity
JOIN faculty_participates_in ON activity.actid = faculty_participates_in.actid
JOIN faculty ON faculty_participates_in.facid = faculty.facid
WHERE faculty.fname = 'Daniel'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Activity.actid
FROM Activity
JOIN Faculty_Participates_in ON Activity.actid = Faculty_Participates_in.actid
JOIN Faculty ON Faculty_Participates_in.FacID = Faculty.FacID
WHERE Faculty.Fname = 'Daniel'

records.question: Which activities named Canasta involve Mark Giuliano, a male Instructor in room 224 of the NEB building with a phone number of at least 2424?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT activity.actid FROM activity
JOIN faculty_participates_in ON activity.actid = faculty_participates_in.actid
JOIN faculty ON faculty_participates_in.facid = faculty.facid
WHERE activity.activity_name = 'Canasta' AND faculty.building = 'NEB' AND faculty.fname = 'Mark' AND faculty.sex = 'M' AND faculty.room = '224' AND faculty.phone >= 2424 AND faculty.rank = 'Instructor' AND faculty.lname = 'Giuliano'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT a.actid
FROM Activity a
JOIN Faculty_Participates_in fpi ON a.actid = fpi.actid
JOIN Faculty f ON fpi.FacID = f.FacID
WHERE a.activity_name = 'Canasta'
  AND f.Fname = 'Mark'
  AND f.Lname = 'Giuliano'
  AND f.Sex = 'M'
  AND f.Rank = 'Instructor'
  AND f.Room = '224'
  AND f.Building = 'NEB'
  AND f.Phone >= 2424

records.question: Which activities named Extreme Canasta involve a male student named David Shieber from NYC who is at most 20 years old and has an advisor number no more than 8722?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT activity.actid FROM activity
JOIN participates_in ON activity.actid = participates_in.actid
JOIN student ON participates_in.stuid = student.stuid
WHERE student.advisor <= 8722 AND student.lname = 'Shieber' AND student.city_code = 'NYC' AND student.sex = 'M' AND student.fname = 'David' AND activity.activity_name = 'Extreme Canasta' AND student.age <= 20
records.pred_sql:
SELECT a.actid
FROM Activity a
JOIN Participates_in p ON a.actid = p.actid
JOIN Student s ON p.stuid = s.StuID
WHERE a.activity_name = 'Extreme Canasta'
  AND s.Fname = 'David'
  AND s.LName = 'Shieber'
  AND s.Sex = 'M'
  AND s.city_code = 'NYC'
  AND s.Age <= 20
  AND s.Advisor <= 8722

JOIN Faculty_Participates_in ON Activity.actid = Faculty_Participates_in.actid
WHERE Activity.activity_name = 'Canoeing'

records.question: Which activities involve faculty members and have the activity name exactly Soccer?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT activity.actid FROM activity
JOIN faculty_participates_in ON activity.actid = faculty_participates_in.actid
WHERE activity.activity_name = 'Soccer'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Activity.actid
FROM Activity
JOIN Faculty_Participates_in ON Activity.actid = Faculty_Participates_in.actid
WHERE Activity.activity_name = 'Soccer'

records.question: Which activities involve students with a major of at least 520?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT activity.actid FROM activity
JOIN participates_in ON activity.actid = participates_in.actid
JOIN student ON participates_in.stuid = student.stuid
WHERE student.major >= 520
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Activity.actid
FROM Activity
JOIN Participates_in ON Activity.actid = Participates_in.actid
JOIN Student ON Participates_in.stuid = Student.StuID
WHERE Student.Major >= 520

records.question: Which activities named 'Canoeing' have recorded participates_in entries and also have recorded faculty_participates_in entries?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT activity.actid FROM activity
JOIN participates_in ON activity.actid = participates_in.actid
JOIN faculty_participates_in ON activity.actid = faculty_participates_in.actid
WHERE activity.activity_name = 'Canoeing'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT a.actid
FROM Activity a
WHERE a.activity_name = 'Canoeing'
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Participates_in p WHERE p.actid = a.actid)
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Faculty_Participates_in f WHERE f.actid = a.actid)

records.question: Which activities involve the male student Mark Schwartz from DET who is at most 17 years old, has an advisor number no more than 2192, and a major number at most 600?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT activity.actid FROM activity
JOIN participates_in ON activity.actid = participates_in.actid
JOIN student ON participates_in.stuid = student.stuid
WHERE student.fname = 'Mark' AND student.lname = 'Schwartz' AND student.sex = 'M' AND student.city_code = 'DET' AND student.advisor <= 2192 AND student.age <= 17 AND student.major <= 600
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Activity.actid
FROM Activity
JOIN Participates_in ON Activity.actid = Participates_in.actid
JOIN Student ON Participates_in.stuid = Student.StuID
WHERE Student.Fname = 'Mark'
  AND Student.LName = 'Schwartz'
  AND Student.Sex = 'M'
  AND Student.city_code = 'DET'
  AND Student.Age <= 17
  AND Student.Advisor <= 2192
  AND Student.Major <= 600
